title: Add Basic Pollinations Image Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: New sprout in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Another app takes root in the greenhouse. The Basic Pollinations Image Generator is now listed, proving once again that giving people free API access leads to cool things.
gist.summary: Added the Basic Pollinations Image Generator to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: The community directory grows by one, giving users another way to generate images using the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an app to the 'Greenhouse' directory. Visuals should feature Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse setting, tending to a plant that is growing a picture frame or image, representing the new image generator app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing code-plant inside a warm glass greenhouse. The plant is blooming into a beautiful framed picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
